title: crotalaria digitata
intro: Crotalaria digitata, also known as Finger Crotalaria or Finger Rattlebox, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, derived from its seeds and leaves. The health benefits of Crotalaria digitata include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and wounds. In herbal preparations, the seeds and leaves of the plant are often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
